title: Code owners
description: Schema for validating the code-owners file in the Senses project

id.description: Squad Finder ID of the team. See: https://hub.rabobank.nl/rop-portal/docs/senses/senses-4-tooling/code-owners-8692e616-5208-3b10-a2cd-fcece82ed1ca/

productOwner.description: Rabobank email address of Product Owner of the team (synced from Squad Finder). See: https://hub.rabobank.nl/rop-portal/docs/senses/senses-4-tooling/code-owners-8692e616-5208-3b10-a2cd-fcece82ed1ca/

functionalMailbox.description: Functional Mailbox email address of the team (synced from Squad Finder). See: https://hub.rabobank.nl/rop-portal/docs/senses/senses-4-tooling/code-owners-8692e616-5208-3b10-a2cd-fcece82ed1ca/

members.description: Rabobank email addresses for each member of the team. See: https://hub.rabobank.nl/rop-portal/docs/senses/senses-4-tooling/code-owners-8692e616-5208-3b10-a2cd-fcece82ed1ca/

paths.description: Paths to files or directories which are owned by the team. See: https://hub.rabobank.nl/rop-portal/docs/senses/senses-4-tooling/code-owners-8692e616-5208-3b10-a2cd-fcece82ed1ca/
